rationale: The confirmed US-Iran ceasefire announcement with Hormuz reopening and falling oil prices is the most impactful event for Romania — a qualitative step from prior 'deal expected' state, with positive energy cost implications.

top_events.title: US-Iran ceasefire announced; Strait of Hormuz reopening; oil prices slide
top_events.summary: The confirmed ceasefire announcement is a qualitative upgrade from prior rhetoric — oil prices already falling, which benefits Romania's energy-sensitive economy. Full impact depends on Friday's signing.

top_events.title: G7 summit protests in Geneva
top_events.summary: Protests at the G7 summit are a distant event with no direct impact on Romanian daily life or regional security.

top_events.title: Russia-Ukraine war continues; AI resurrection stories emerge
top_events.summary: No qualitative change in the war near Romania's border — continuation of background situation with no new escalation.
